title: remove whisper + GPU worker + WireGuard tunnel
description:
## Summary

Whisper has been Pending in mentolder production since the korczewski cluster split — its 2 CPU / 4 GiB request stopped fitting on the remaining gekko CPs. The previous live op (`kubectl delete deploy/whisper svc/whisper`) freed the running resources; this PR removes the manifests so the next deploy doesn't recreate it, plus everything that exclusively supported whisper.

**Removed manifests/resources**
- `k3d/whisper.yaml`, `k3d/whisper-gpu.yaml` — CPU + GPU deployment + Service
- `prod/patch-whisper.yaml`, `prod/whisper-gpu.yaml` — prod CPU/GPU overlays
- `prod/patch-amd64-only.yaml` — only patched whisper (added arm64 nodeSelector exclusion)
- `docker-compose.gpu-worker.yaml` — local GPU compose stack (whisper + ollama)
- `scripts/setup-wireguard.sh` — 10.13.13.0/24 tunnel was for the GPU worker (unrelated to the cluster's 192.168.100.x WireGuard mesh, which stays)
- `k3d/docs-content/whisper.md` — docs page

**Removed Taskfile tasks**
- `whisper:deploy`, `whisper:status`, `whisper:logs`
- `gpu-worker:start`, `:stop`, `:status`, `:logs`, `:switch-dev`, `:switch-dev-cpu`, `:switch-prod`, `:switch-prod-cpu`
- `wireguard:setup`, `:up`, `:down`, `:status`

**Updated**
- `k3d/kustomization.yaml` — dropped `whisper.yaml` resource + `whisper.md` configMapGenerator entry
- `prod/kustomization.yaml` — dropped `patch-whisper.yaml` + `patch-amd64-only.yaml` patches
- `CLAUDE.md`, `README.md`, `k3d/docs-content/_sidebar.md` — pruned whisper command tables and sidebar link

**803 lines net deletion across 14 files.**

## Caveats (intentionally out of scope — follow-ups)

1. `k3d/talk-transcriber.yaml` stays — the bot's whisper backend is gone, so live transcription will silently fail. Removing the transcriber as a feature is a separate decision.
2. `scripts/transcriber-setup.sh` still calls `occ config:app:set stt_whisper2 url --value=http://whisper:8000/v1` — fails at setup time, same scope as transcriber removal.
3. `bachelorprojekt.transcriptions.whisper_model` column in `k3d/website-schema.yaml` stays — proper schema migration needed.
4. Stale `task whisper:*` mentions remain in `k3d/docs-content/services.md`, `operations.md`, and `docs/autonomous-browser-agent-framework.md` — cosmetic, fix in a docs PR.

## Test plan

- [x] `kubectl kustomize --load-restrictor=LoadRestrictionsNone k3d` — exits 0
- [x] `kubectl kustomize --load-restrictor=LoadRestrictionsNone prod-mentolder` — exits 0
- [x] `kubectl kustomize --load-restrictor=LoadRestrictionsNone prod-korczewski` — exits 0
- [x] All 10 mentolder live URLs healthy at HEAD (web/auth/files/brett/livekit/vault/board/sign/tracking/docs)
- [ ] After merge: monitor mentolder for one rollout to confirm no resurrected whisper resources
